title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be exploited if malicious actors modify or distribute tampered versions to unsuspecting users. Additionally, reliance on such tools without proper validation could lead to false positives or missed vulnerabilities.
recommended_actions: Verify the authenticity and integrity of the tool before using it by checking its source repository and digital signatures.
Conduct internal testing of the tool in a controlled environment to ensure it performs as expected and does not introduce risks.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure and not as a replacement for comprehensive security assessments.

title: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Rymera Web Co Pty Ltd. Woocommerce Wholesale Lead...
description: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Rymera Web Co Pty Ltd. Woocommerce Wholesale Lead Capture allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects Woocommerce Wholesale Lead Capture: from n/a through 2.0.3.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in the Woocommerce Wholesale Lead Capture plugin allows unauthorized users to escalate privileges, potentially gaining access to sensitive information or administrative control over affected systems. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized transactions, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Woocommerce Wholesale Lead Capture plugin to the latest patched version, if available.
Review and audit user roles and permissions to ensure no unauthorized privilege escalation has occurred.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity and implement additional security measures, such as Web Application Firewalls (WAF), to mitigate exploitation attempts.

title: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in BuddhaThemes ColorFolio - Freelance Designer...
description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in BuddhaThemes ColorFolio - Freelance Designer WordPress Theme allows Object Injection.This issue affects ColorFolio - Freelance Designer WordPress Theme: from n/a through 1.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit deserialization of untrusted data, potentially leading to remote code execution, unauthorized access, or data manipulation. This can compromise the integrity and security of websites using the affected WordPress theme.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the BuddhaThemes ColorFolio WordPress theme to the latest patched version if available.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting deserialization vulnerabilities.
Review server logs for any signs of exploitation and conduct a security audit of the website.

title: The SlimStat Analytics plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the ...
description: The SlimStat Analytics plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'fh' (fingerprint) parameter in all versions up to, and including, 5.3.5 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts into web pages, which can execute whenever a user accesses the affected page. This can lead to session hijacking, credential theft, defacement, or the spread of malware.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the SlimStat Analytics plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable it temporarily.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting the 'fh' parameter.
Conduct a security audit of your WordPress site to identify and remediate any existing malicious scripts or unauthorized changes.

description: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in Really Simple Plugins B.V. Really Simple Security Pro allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels.This issue affects Really Simple Security Pro: from n/a through 9.5.4.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27397.

title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')...
description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Cozmoslabs Profile Builder Pro allows Blind SQL Injection.This issue affects Profile Builder Pro: from n/a through 3.13.9.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform Blind SQL Injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, data manipulation, or full database compromise. This could severely impact the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Profile Builder Pro to the latest patched version (if available) or apply any security patches provided by the vendor.
Perform a thorough review of database queries within the application to ensure proper input sanitization and parameterized queries are implemented.
Monitor application and database logs for unusual activity, such as unexpected SQL queries, and implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests.

title: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This...
description: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows an authenticated user to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1276.

title: OpenClaw versions 2026.2.22 and 2026.2.23 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in the...
description: OpenClaw versions 2026.2.22 and 2026.2.23 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in the synology-chat channel plugin where dmPolicy set to allowlist with empty allowedUserIds fails open. Attackers with Synology sender access can bypass authorization checks and trigger unauthorized agent dispatch and downstream tool actions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The authorization bypass vulnerability in OpenClaw versions 2026.2.22 and 2026.2.23 allows attackers with Synology sender access to exploit misconfigured dmPolicy settings. This can result in unauthorized agent dispatch and downstream tool actions, potentially leading to data breaches, service disruptions, or unauthorized access to sensitive systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of OpenClaw if available, or apply any vendor-recommended mitigations.
Audit and review all dmPolicy configurations, ensuring that allowedUserIds are explicitly defined and not left empty.
Restrict Synology sender access to trusted users only and monitor for any unusual activity in the affected systems.

title: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.23 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run...
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.23 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run guardrails that allows authenticated operators to execute unintended commands. When /usr/bin/env is allowlisted, attackers can use env -S to bypass policy analysis and execute shell wrapper payloads at runtime.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31992.

title: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 contain a command injection vulnerability in the Lobster...
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 contain a command injection vulnerability in the Lobster extension tool execution that uses Windows shell fallback with shell: true after spawn failures. Attackers can inject shell metacharacters in command arguments to execute arbitrary commands when subprocess launch fails with EINVAL or ENOENT errors.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32000.

title: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.26 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability where Signal...
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.26 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability where Signal group allowlist policy incorrectly accepts sender identities from DM pairing-store approvals. Attackers can exploit this boundary weakness by obtaining DM pairing approval to bypass group allowlist checks and gain unauthorized group access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31991.

title: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This...
description: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows users to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to inject arbitrary JavaScript code into the Web UI of IBM QRadar SIEM, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions within the system. This could compromise the integrity and confidentiality of sensitive security data.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by IBM to address the vulnerability.
Implement input validation and sanitization to mitigate cross-site scripting risks in the Web UI.
Conduct a thorough security review of the system and monitor for any unusual activity or exploitation attempts.

title: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a vulnerability in the stageSandboxMedia function in...
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.2 contain a vulnerability in the stageSandboxMedia function in which it fails to validate destination symlinks during media staging, allowing writes to follow symlinks outside the sandbox workspace. Attackers can exploit this by placing symlinks in the media/inbound directory to overwrite arbitrary files on the host system outside sandbox boundaries.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31990.

title: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 tools.exec.safeBins contains an input validation bypass...
description: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.19 tools.exec.safeBins contains an input validation bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to execute unintended filesystem operations through sort output flags or recursive grep flags. Attackers with command execution access can leverage sort -o flag for arbitrary file writes or grep -R flag for recursive file reads, circumventing intended stdin-only restrictions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers with command execution access to bypass input validation restrictions, potentially leading to arbitrary file writes or recursive file reads. This could compromise sensitive data or disrupt system operations.
recommended_actions: Upgrade OpenClaw to version 2026.2.19 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict access to command execution interfaces and monitor for unusual activity.
Implement additional input validation checks to mitigate potential exploitation.

title: OpenClaw versions 2026.2.26 prior to 2026.3.1 on Windows contain a current working directory...
description: OpenClaw versions 2026.2.26 prior to 2026.3.1 on Windows contain a current working directory injection vulnerability in wrapper resolution for .cmd/.bat files that allows attackers to influence execution behavior through cwd manipulation. Remote attackers can exploit improper shell execution fallback mechanisms to achieve command execution integrity loss by controlling the current working directory during wrapper resolution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31999.

title: OpenClaw 2026.3.1 contains an approval integrity vulnerability in system.run node-host execution...
description: OpenClaw 2026.3.1 contains an approval integrity vulnerability in system.run node-host execution where argv rewriting changes command semantics. Attackers can place malicious local scripts in the working directory to execute unintended code despite operator approval of different command text.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-29608.

title: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 stores potentially sensitive information in...
description: IBM QRadar SIEM 7.5.0 through 7.5.0 Update Package 14 stores potentially sensitive information in configuration files that could be read by a local user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local users to access sensitive configuration files, potentially exposing credentials, API keys, or other confidential information. This could lead to unauthorized access, lateral movement, or data breaches if exploited.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security update or patch provided by IBM to address CVE-2025-36051.
Restrict local access to the system by enforcing strict user permissions and access controls.
Conduct a review of configuration files to identify and rotate any exposed sensitive information, such as credentials or keys.

title:
CVE-2025-15038 - An Out-of-Bounds
Read vulnerability exists in the ASUS Business System
Control Interface driver. Thi
description:
An Out-of-Bounds
Read vulnerability exists in the ASUS Business System
Control Interface driver. This vulnerability can be triggered by an unprivileged local  user
sending a specially crafted IOCTL  request, potentially leading
to a disclosure of
kernel information or a system crash. Refer to the "Security Update for ASUS 
Business System Control Interface" section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15038.

title:
CVE-2025-15037 - An Incorrect
Permission Assignment vulnerability exists in the ASUS Business
System Control Interfac
description:
An Incorrect
Permission Assignment vulnerability exists in the ASUS Business
System Control Interface driver. This vulnerability can be triggered by an unprivileged local user sending a
specially crafted IOCTL request,
potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive hardware resources
and kernel information disclosure. Refer to the "ASUS Business System Control Interface" section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unprivileged local user to gain unauthorized access to sensitive hardware resources and kernel information, potentially leading to privilege escalation or data leaks. This could compromise system integrity and confidentiality.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or driver update provided by ASUS to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict physical and local access to systems running the affected driver to trusted personnel only.
Monitor system logs for unusual IOCTL requests or other suspicious activity that may indicate exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-3973 - A vulnerability was determined in Tenda W3 1.0.0.3(2204). This affects the function formSetAutoPing
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda W3 1.0.0.3(2204). This affects the function formSetAutoPing of the file /goform/setAutoPing of the component POST Parameter Handler. This manipulation of the argument ping1/ping2 causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3973.

title: CVE-2026-3972 - A vulnerability was found in Tenda W3 1.0.0.3(2204). Affected by this issue is the function formSetC
description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda W3 1.0.0.3(2204). Affected by this issue is the function formSetCfm of the file /goform/setcfm of the component HTTP Handler. The manipulation of the argument funcpara1 results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can only be performed from the local network. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3972.

title: CVE-2026-3969 - A vulnerability was detected in FeMiner wms up to 1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file
description: A vulnerability was detected in FeMiner wms up to 1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file /wms-master/src/basic/depart/depart_add_bg.php of the component Basic Organizational Structure Module. Performing a manipulation of the argument Name results in sql injection. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3969.

title: CVE-2026-3968 - A vulnerability has been found in AutohomeCorp frostmourne up to 1.0. This affects the function scri
description: A vulnerability has been found in AutohomeCorp frostmourne up to 1.0. This affects the function scriptEngine.eval of the file ExpressionRule.java of the component Oracle Nashorn JavaScript Engine. Such manipulation of the argument EXPRESSION leads to code injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3968.

title: CVE-2023-43010 - The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in iOS 17.2 and iPadOS 17
description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in iOS 17.2 and iPadOS 17.2, macOS Sonoma 14.2, Safari 17.2, iOS 16.7.15 and iPadOS 16.7.15, iOS 15.8.7 and iPadOS 15.8.7. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to memory corruption.

title: CVE-2026-3967 - A flaw has been found in Alfresco Activiti up to 7.19/8.8.0. Affected by this issue is the function
description: A flaw has been found in Alfresco Activiti up to 7.19/8.8.0. Affected by this issue is the function deserialize/createObjectInputStream of the file activiti-core/activiti-engine/src/main/java/org/activiti/engine/impl/variable/SerializableType.java of the component Process Variable Serialization System. This manipulation causes deserialization. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been published and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3967.

title: CVE-2026-3966 - A vulnerability was detected in 648540858 wvp-GB28181-pro up to 2.7.4-20260107. Affected by this vul
description: A vulnerability was detected in 648540858 wvp-GB28181-pro up to 2.7.4-20260107. Affected by this vulnerability is the function getDownloadFilePath of the file /src/main/java/com/genersoft/iot/vmp/media/abl/ABLMediaNodeServerService.java of the component IP Address Handler. The manipulation of the argument MediaServer.streamIp results in server-side request forgery. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3966.

title: CVE-2026-3965 - A security vulnerability has been detected in whyour qinglong up to 2.20.1. Affected is an unknown f
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in whyour qinglong up to 2.20.1. Affected is an unknown function of the file back/loaders/express.ts of the component API Interface. The manipulation of the argument command leads to protection mechanism failure. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. Upgrading to version 2.20.2 is able to address this issue. The identifier of the patch is 6bec52dca158481258315ba0fc2f11206df7b719. It is advisable to upgrade the affected component. The code maintainer was informed beforehand about the issues. He reacted very fast and highly professional.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3965.

title: CVE-2026-2808 - HashiCorp Consul and Consul Enterprise 1.18.20 up to 1.21.10 and 1.22.4 are vulnerable to arbitrary
description: HashiCorp Consul and Consul Enterprise 1.18.20 up to 1.21.10 and 1.22.4 are vulnerable to arbitrary file read when configured with Kubernetes authentication. This vulnerability, CVE-2026-2808, is fixed in Consul 1.18.21, 1.21.11 and 1.22.5.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2808.
